exportBucketArn.description: S3 bucket ARN to export Source Network templates.

launchIntoSourceInstance.description: DRS will set the 'launch into instance ID' of any source server when performing a drill, recovery or failback to the previous region or availability zone, using the instance ID of the source instance.

osByol.description: Whether to enable "Bring your own license" or not.

tags.description: Tags of the Launch Configuration Template.

nextToken.description: The token of the next Job to retrieve.

creationDateTime.description: The date and time of when the Job was created.

endDateTime.description: The date and time of when the Job ended.

initiatedBy.description: A string representing who initiated the Job.

participatingResources.description: A list of resources that the Job is acting upon.

participatingServers.description: A list of servers that the Job is acting upon.

tags.description: A list of tags associated with the Job.

nextToken.description: The token of the next Launch Configuration Template to retrieve.

exportBucketArn.description: S3 bucket ARN to export Source Network templates.

launchIntoSourceInstance.description: DRS will set the 'launch into instance ID' of any source server when performing a drill, recovery or failback to the previous region or availability zone, using the instance ID of the source instance.

osByol.description: Whether to enable "Bring your own license" or not.

tags.description: Tags of the Launch Configuration Template.

nextToken.description: The token of the next Recovery Instance to retrieve.

agentVersion.description: The version of the DRS agent installed on the recovery instance

dataReplicationInfo.description: The Data Replication Info of the Recovery Instance.

dataReplicationInitiation.description: Information about whether the data replication has been initiated.

startDateTime.description: The date and time of the current attempt to initiate data replication.

steps.description: The steps of the current attempt to initiate data replication.

etaDateTime.description: An estimate of when the data replication will be completed.

stagingAvailabilityZone.description: AWS Availability zone into which data is being replicated.

ec2InstanceID.description: The EC2 instance ID of the Recovery Instance.

ec2InstanceState.description: The state of the EC2 instance for this Recovery Instance.

failback.description: An object representing failback related information of the Recovery Instance.

agentLastSeenByServiceDateTime.description: The date and time the agent on the Recovery Instance was last seen by the service.

elapsedReplicationDuration.description: The amount of time that the Recovery Instance has been replicating for.

failbackClientID.description: The ID of the failback client that this Recovery Instance is associated with.

failbackClientLastSeenByServiceDateTime.description: The date and time that the failback client was last seen by the service.

failbackInitiationTime.description: The date and time that the failback initiation started.

failbackJobID.description: The Job ID of the last failback log for this Recovery Instance.

failbackLaunchType.description: The launch type (Recovery / Drill) of the last launch for the failback replication of this recovery instance.

failbackToOriginalServer.description: Whether we are failing back to the original Source Server for this Recovery Instance.

firstByteDateTime.description: The date and time of the first byte that was replicated from the Recovery Instance.

state.description: The state of the failback process that this Recovery Instance is in.

isDrill.description: Whether this Recovery Instance was created for a drill or for an actual Recovery event.

jobID.description: The ID of the Job that created the Recovery Instance.

originAvailabilityZone.description: AWS availability zone associated with the recovery instance.

originEnvironment.description: Environment (On Premises / AWS) of the instance that the recovery instance originated from.

pointInTimeSnapshotDateTime.description: The date and time of the Point in Time (PIT) snapshot that this Recovery Instance was launched from.

identificationHints.description: Hints used to uniquely identify a machine.

lastUpdatedDateTime.description: The date and time the Recovery Instance properties were last updated on.

fullString.description: The long name of the Operating System.

sourceServerID.description: The Source Server ID that this Recovery Instance is associated with.

tags.description: An array of tags that are associated with the Recovery Instance.

nextToken.description: The token of the next Replication Configuration Template to retrieve.

associateDefaultSecurityGroup.description: Whether to associate the default Elastic Disaster Recovery Security group with the Replication Configuration Template.

autoReplicateNewDisks.description: Whether to allow the AWS replication agent to automatically replicate newly added disks.

bandwidthThrottling.description: Configure bandwidth throttling for the outbound data transfer rate of the Source Server in Mbps.

createPublicIP.description: Whether to create a Public IP for the Recovery Instance by default.

dataPlaneRouting.description: The data plane routing mechanism that will be used for replication.

defaultLargeStagingDiskType.description: The Staging Disk EBS volume type to be used during replication.

ebsEncryption.description: The type of EBS encryption to be used during replication.

ebsEncryptionKeyArn.description: The ARN of the EBS encryption key to be used during replication.

pitPolicy.description: The Point in time (PIT) policy to manage snapshots taken during replication.

replicationServerInstanceType.description: The instance type to be used for the replication server.

replicationServersSecurityGroupsIDs.description: The security group IDs that will be used by the replication server.

stagingAreaSubnetId.description: The subnet to be used by the replication staging area.

stagingAreaTags.description: A set of tags to be associated with all resources created in the replication staging area: EC2 replication server, EBS volumes, EBS snapshots, etc.

tags.description: A set of tags to be associated with the Replication Configuration Template resource.

useDedicatedReplicationServer.description: Whether to use a dedicated Replication Server in the replication staging area.

nextToken.description: The token of the next Source Networks to retrieve.

cfnStackName.description: CloudFormation stack name that was deployed for recovering the Source Network.

lastRecovery.description: An object containing information regarding the last recovery of the Source Network.

apiCallDateTime.description: The date and time the last Source Network recovery was initiated.

jobID.description: The ID of the Job that was used to last recover the Source Network.

lastRecoveryResult.description: The status of the last recovery status of this Source Network.

launchedVpcID.description: ID of the recovered VPC following Source Network recovery.

replicationStatus.description: Status of Source Network Replication. Possible values: (a) STOPPED - Source Network is not replicating. (b) IN_PROGRESS - Source Network is being replicated. (c) PROTECTED - Source Network was replicated successfully and is being synchronized for changes. (d) ERROR - Source Network replication has failed

replicationStatusDetails.description: Error details in case Source Network replication status is ERROR.

sourceAccountID.description: Account ID containing the VPC protected by the Source Network.

sourceRegion.description: Region containing the VPC protected by the Source Network.

sourceVpcID.description: VPC ID protected by the Source Network.

lifeCycle.description: The lifecycle information of this Source Server.

firstByteDateTime.description: The date and time of the first byte that was replicated from the Source Server.

initiated.description: An object containing information regarding the initiation of the last launch of a Source Server.

recoveryInstanceId.description: The ID of the Recovery Instance associated with this Source Server.

fullString.description: The long name of the Operating System.

recommendedInstanceType.description: The recommended EC2 instance type that will be used when recovering the Source Server.

supportsNitroInstances.description: Are EC2 nitro instance types supported when recovering the Source Server.

stagingArea.description: The staging area of the source server.

errorMessage.description: Shows an error message that occurred when DRS tried to access the staging source server. In this case StagingArea$status will have value EXTENSION_ERROR

stagingAccountID.description: Account ID of the account to which source server belongs. If this source server is extended - shows Account ID of staging source server.

stagingSourceServerArn.description: Arn of the staging source server if this source server is extended

status.description: Status of Source server extension. Possible values: (a) NOT_EXTENDED - This is a source server that is replicating in the current account. (b) EXTENDED - Source server is extended from a staging source server. In this case, the value of stagingSourceServerArn is pointing to the Arn of the source server in the staging account. (c) EXTENSION_ERROR - Some issue occurred when accessing staging source server. In this case, errorMessage field will contain an error message that explains what happened.

sourceProperties.description: The source properties of the Source Server.

identificationHints.description: Hints used to uniquely identify a machine.

lastUpdatedDateTime.description: The date and time the Source Properties were last updated on.

fullString.description: The long name of the Operating System.

recommendedInstanceType.description: The recommended EC2 instance type that will be used when recovering the Source Server.

supportsNitroInstances.description: Are EC2 nitro instance types supported when recovering the Source Server.

stagingArea.description: The staging area of the source server.

errorMessage.description: Shows an error message that occurred when DRS tried to access the staging source server. In this case StagingArea$status will have value EXTENSION_ERROR

stagingAccountID.description: Account ID of the account to which source server belongs. If this source server is extended - shows Account ID of staging source server.

stagingSourceServerArn.description: Arn of the staging source server if this source server is extended

status.description: Status of Source server extension. Possible values: (a) NOT_EXTENDED - This is a source server that is replicating in the current account. (b) EXTENDED - Source server is extended from a staging source server. In this case, the value of stagingSourceServerArn is pointing to the Arn of the source server in the staging account. (c) EXTENSION_ERROR - Some issue occurred when accessing staging source server. In this case, errorMessage field will contain an error message that explains what happened.

tags.description: The tags associated with the Source Server.

sourceNetwork.description: Source Network which was requested to stop replication.

cfnStackName.description: CloudFormation stack name that was deployed for recovering the Source Network.

lastRecovery.description: An object containing information regarding the last recovery of the Source Network.

apiCallDateTime.description: The date and time the last Source Network recovery was initiated.

jobID.description: The ID of the Job that was used to last recover the Source Network.

lastRecoveryResult.description: The status of the last recovery status of this Source Network.

launchedVpcID.description: ID of the recovered VPC following Source Network recovery.

replicationStatus.description: Status of Source Network Replication. Possible values: (a) STOPPED - Source Network is not replicating. (b) IN_PROGRESS - Source Network is being replicated. (c) PROTECTED - Source Network was replicated successfully and is being synchronized for changes. (d) ERROR - Source Network replication has failed

replicationStatusDetails.description: Error details in case Source Network replication status is ERROR.

sourceAccountID.description: Account ID containing the VPC protected by the Source Network.

sourceRegion.description: Region containing the VPC protected by the Source Network.

sourceVpcID.description: VPC ID protected by the Source Network.

tags.description: A list of tags associated with the Source Network.

job.description: The Job for terminating the Recovery Instances.

creationDateTime.description: The date and time of when the Job was created.

endDateTime.description: The date and time of when the Job ended.

initiatedBy.description: A string representing who initiated the Job.

participatingResources.description: A list of resources that the Job is acting upon.

participatingServers.description: A list of servers that the Job is acting upon.

tags.description: A list of tags associated with the Job.

copyPrivateIp.description: Whether we should copy the Private IP of the Source Server to the Recovery Instance.

copyTags.description: Whether we want to copy the tags of the Source Server to the EC2 machine of the Recovery Instance.

ec2LaunchTemplateID.description: The EC2 launch template ID of this launch configuration.

launchDisposition.description: The state of the Recovery Instance in EC2 after the recovery operation.

licensing.description: The licensing configuration to be used for this launch configuration.

postLaunchEnabled.description: Whether we want to activate post-launch actions for the Source Server.

sourceServerID.description: The ID of the Source Server for this launch configuration.

targetInstanceTypeRightSizingMethod.description: Whether Elastic Disaster Recovery should try to automatically choose the instance type that best matches the OS, CPU, and RAM of your Source Server.

launchIntoEC2InstanceID.description: Optionally holds EC2 instance ID of an instance to launch into, instead of launching a new instance during drill, recovery or failback.

exportBucketArn.description: S3 bucket ARN to export Source Network templates.

launchIntoSourceInstance.description: DRS will set the 'launch into instance ID' of any source server when performing a drill, recovery or failback to the previous region or availability zone, using the instance ID of the source instance.

osByol.description: Whether to enable "Bring your own license" or not.

tags.description: Tags of the Launch Configuration Template.

associateDefaultSecurityGroup.description: Whether to associate the default Elastic Disaster Recovery Security group with the Replication Configuration.

autoReplicateNewDisks.description: Whether to allow the AWS replication agent to automatically replicate newly added disks.

bandwidthThrottling.description: Configure bandwidth throttling for the outbound data transfer rate of the Source Server in Mbps.

createPublicIP.description: Whether to create a Public IP for the Recovery Instance by default.

dataPlaneRouting.description: The data plane routing mechanism that will be used for replication.

defaultLargeStagingDiskType.description: The Staging Disk EBS volume type to be used during replication.

ebsEncryption.description: The type of EBS encryption to be used during replication.

ebsEncryptionKeyArn.description: The ARN of the EBS encryption key to be used during replication.

pitPolicy.description: The Point in time (PIT) policy to manage snapshots taken during replication.

replicatedDisks.description: The configuration of the disks of the Source Server to be replicated.

replicationServerInstanceType.description: The instance type to be used for the replication server.

replicationServersSecurityGroupsIDs.description: The security group IDs that will be used by the replication server.

sourceServerID.description: The ID of the Source Server for this Replication Configuration.

stagingAreaSubnetId.description: The subnet to be used by the replication staging area.

stagingAreaTags.description: A set of tags to be associated with all resources created in the replication staging area: EC2 replication server, EBS volumes, EBS snapshots, etc.

useDedicatedReplicationServer.description: Whether to use a dedicated Replication Server in the replication staging area.

associateDefaultSecurityGroup.description: Whether to associate the default Elastic Disaster Recovery Security group with the Replication Configuration Template.

autoReplicateNewDisks.description: Whether to allow the AWS replication agent to automatically replicate newly added disks.

bandwidthThrottling.description: Configure bandwidth throttling for the outbound data transfer rate of the Source Server in Mbps.

createPublicIP.description: Whether to create a Public IP for the Recovery Instance by default.

dataPlaneRouting.description: The data plane routing mechanism that will be used for replication.

defaultLargeStagingDiskType.description: The Staging Disk EBS volume type to be used during replication.

ebsEncryption.description: The type of EBS encryption to be used during replication.

ebsEncryptionKeyArn.description: The ARN of the EBS encryption key to be used during replication.

pitPolicy.description: The Point in time (PIT) policy to manage snapshots taken during replication.

replicationServerInstanceType.description: The instance type to be used for the replication server.

replicationServersSecurityGroupsIDs.description: The security group IDs that will be used by the replication server.

stagingAreaSubnetId.description: The subnet to be used by the replication staging area.

stagingAreaTags.description: A set of tags to be associated with all resources created in the replication staging area: EC2 replication server, EBS volumes, EBS snapshots, etc.

tags.description: A set of tags to be associated with the Replication Configuration Template resource.

useDedicatedReplicationServer.description: Whether to use a dedicated Replication Server in the replication staging area.
